title: stenotaphrum sarmentosum
intro: Stenotaphrum sarmentosum, also known as Buffalo Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Stenotaphrum sarmentosum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
